stemHtml: An aeroplane is equipped with a spring tab. As the airspeed increases, the assistance from the spring tab (1) _____ . At high speed, the pilot moves the (2) _____ which then moves the (3) _____.

options.a: (1) increases; (2) the tab; (3) the control surface
options.b: (1) decreases; (2) the tab; (3) the control surface
options.c: (1) increases; (2) the control surface; (3) the tab
options.d: (1) decreases; (2) the control surface; (3) the tab
